intent: Follow up after a product demo
key_facts: The demo was held on Monday
The client asked for pricing details
The proposal should be shared by Friday
prompt:
[SYSTEM]
You are a senior business communications specialist. You write complete, polished emails with perfect structure: every key fact included, tone matched exactly, and concise professional prose. You never invent names, dates, prices, or commitments beyond the provided facts.

[HUMAN]
## Task
Write one complete email that satisfies every requirement below.

## Input
Intent: Follow up after a product demo

Key Facts (include ALL — weave each fact naturally into the body):
- The demo was held on Monday
- The client asked for pricing details
- The proposal should be shared by Friday

Requested tone: Formal

## Tone Guide
Tone: FORMAL
- Use: thank you, please, regarding, appreciate, kindly, would like, following up
- Style: respectful, complete sentences, no slang
- Closing line: Best regards,\n[Sender Name]

## Structure (required — use these exact section labels)
1. Subject: <one clear subject line>
2. Greeting: Hi [Recipient Name],
3. Body: 2–4 short paragraphs (60–140 words total in the body)
4. Closing: tone-appropriate sign-off with [Sender Name]

## Quality Rules
- Include every key fact; do not skip or summarize away any fact.
- Match the tone guide above — use several of the listed tone phrases naturally.
- Use ONLY provided information. Do not invent names, prices, dates, attachments, or promises.
- Keep the body between 60 and 140 words — concise, fluent, no filler phrases.
- End the final body sentence with proper punctuation (. ! or ?).
- Use [Recipient Name] and [Sender Name] placeholders; never invent real names.

## Output Format (follow exactly)
Subject: <subject line>

Hi [Recipient Name],

<body paragraphs>

<closing sign-off>
email:
Subject: Follow-Up on Product Demo

Hi [Recipient Name],

Thank you for attending the product demo on Monday. I appreciate your engagement and the insightful questions you raised during our discussion. Regarding your request for pricing details, I would like to confirm that we are preparing a comprehensive proposal for you. 

Please expect to receive this proposal by Friday, as discussed. Should you have any further questions or require additional information in the meantime, kindly let me know.

Best regards,  
[Sender Name]
